title: Files
emptyDescription: Upload your first file from the top right

deleteDialog.title: Delete file
deleteDialog.description: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

bulkDeleteDialog.title: Delete files
bulkDeleteDialog.description: Delete the {count} selected files? This action cannot be undone.

preview.workspaceDescription: Select a file to preview, download, and inspect details.
preview.unsupportedTitle: This file type cannot be previewed
preview.unsupportedDescription: Online preview is not supported for this file type. Try downloading it instead.
preview.noExtractDescription: This file has no extracted text to display.

rag.enabledTitle: Smart retrieval is enabled. Click to disable.
rag.disabledTitle: Smart retrieval is disabled. Click to enable.
rag.enabledToast: Smart retrieval enabled for this file
rag.disabledToast: Smart retrieval disabled for this file

toasts.viewAfterLogin: Sign in again to view files.
toasts.uploadAfterLogin: Sign in again before uploading files.
toasts.deleteAfterLogin: Sign in again before deleting files.
toasts.renameAfterLogin: Sign in again before renaming files.
toasts.previewProcessingFailed: File processing failed. Preview is unavailable.
toasts.previewProcessing: File is still processing. Preview will be available later.
toasts.extractProcessingFailed: File processing failed. No extracted text is available.
toasts.extractProcessing: Extraction is not complete yet. Try again later.

previewDialog.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
previewDialog.downloadHint: Download the file to view it
previewDialog.downloadUnavailableForShare: Public shares do not provide downloads.
previewDialog.description: Preview this file in a dialog.

previewErrors.documentUnsupportedTitle: This file type cannot be previewed
previewErrors.documentUnsupportedDescription: Online preview is not supported for this file type. Try downloading it instead.
previewErrors.pdfLoadFailed: Failed to load PDF preview. Try opening the original file in a new tab.
previewErrors.pdfPassword: This PDF is password protected and cannot be previewed here. Open the original file instead.
previewErrors.pdfInvalid: This PDF is malformed or damaged and cannot be previewed here.
previewErrors.pdfReadFailed: Failed to read the PDF. Try again later or open the original file.
previewErrors.wordContainerNotReady: Word preview container is not ready

status.processingFailedDetail: File processing failed. Upload again or adjust the policy and retry.
status.indexFailedDetail: The file is available for full-context chat, but smart retrieval indexing failed.
status.waitingDetail: File uploaded and waiting for the processing queue.
status.queuedDetail: File is queued and ready for text extraction.
status.ocrDetail: OCR is recognizing and extracting text.
status.extractingDetail: Extracting text content from the file.
status.embeddingDetail: Text extraction is complete. Semantic vector index is being generated.
status.readyRagDetail: File is ready and supports full-context injection and smart retrieval (RAG).
status.readyFullContextDetail: File processing is complete and can be used in full-context mode.
status.imageReadyDetail: The image can be used in this conversation.
status.genericReadyDetail: File processing is complete and can be used in chats.
